# Corresponding source

Gapless source and reproducible build instructions are published with every
release. The exact source for a release is the matching Git tag in the Gapless
repository.

Auto-Editor 31.2.0 source is available at
<https://github.com/WyattBlue/auto-editor/tree/31.2.0>. Its bundled multimedia
dependencies and their source locations are listed in the release SPDX SBOM.

For any GPL-covered binary distributed by Gapless, a corresponding-source copy
may also be requested through the repository issue tracker for at least three
years after that binary's release.
